title: sideritis salina
intro: Sideritis salina, also known as Greek mountain tea, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis salina include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Sideritis salina can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or it can be taken in capsule or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
